name: ratified decisions (ADR index)
description: @resonance/ui = owned shadcn/Radix primitives styled only with Figma design tokens. Open ADR-0012 before changing the design-system approach.

name: Radix auth primitives + RTL/jsdom setup
description: Auth primitives wrap Radix (checkbox=Root+Indicator, radio=RadioGroup Root+Item+Indicator) styled via cn()/tokens with data-[state=checked] utilities; tested with RTL in jsdom. vitest.setup.ts must stub ResizeObserver (Radix form-bubble input needs it) and call afterEach(cleanup) because @resonance/ui runs vitest with globals off.
Figma MCP is capped per View seat on the Professional plan; heavy reads exhaust it and block token finalization. Plan/credit purchases do NOT lift the View-seat cap.
resolution: Kept provisional tokens; built components token-only (name-referenced ⇒ safe value-swap later); filed resonance-0c47 to finalize when a Dev/Full seat or window reset restores Figma reads (re-read 252:288, 1429:46784, 1509:75825/75822/75823).

content: Read Figma design tokens via get_design_context on a SPECIFIC frame — get_variable_defs is selection-gated in this MCP setup (ignores nodeId, errors 'nothing selected'). Use the higher-budget team-copy fileKey UYlkCL7jkCVgKWiqAVlEFp (Figma copies preserve node ids). Design System frames: Gray Scale 1509:75822, Indicators 1509:75823, Fonts 1429:46784. Gotchas: the neutral ramp is INVERTED (gray-0=black..gray-900=white); font family is Helvetica Neue; type scale lives in theme.css as --text-* (+ tokens/ mirror).

name: Weave streaming rail + profile-draft composites
description: Presentational controlled composites binding @resonance/core contracts (InterviewMessage, CreatorProfileDraft); a shared internal WeaveComposer is interactive in the rail and disabled in the panel (deferred refine loop); new Textarea + Tag/TagGroup primitives (native, token-only). Figma primary CTA is 'Good to go' (not 'put on profile'); secondary 'Revise with Weave' disabled. @resonance/ui now depends on @resonance/core (workspace:*).

title: Defer brand --primary value swap (#a855f7 -> Figma #6034ff)
rationale: get_design_context resolves the Figma design-system --primary variable to #6034ff (indigo) across the EmailVerify 'Try again' link, ProfileGen 'Good to go'/'Revise'/'Add tag', and the active-radio/AddTag border. theme.css currently sets --color-primary to #a855f7 (brand-purple) — a provisional value from the earlier quota-blocked extraction. Onboarding components reference the token BY NAME (bg-primary/text-primary), so they are already correct and pick up whatever the token resolves to; no component change is needed. The value swap itself is a brand-wide change (touches every button/link app-wide, the primary tint ramp, and sits next to the separate brand gradient) so it was NOT done inside the onboarding-fidelity seed — escalated for its own decision/ADR. Same story for the Resonance wordmark + Weave symbol, which are Figma image assets still stubbed as gradient placeholders pending SVG imports.

name: Onboarding composites reconciled to Figma via get_design_context
description: Design-fidelity pass on packages/ui onboarding composites (auth cards, Weave rail+composer, profile panels). Figma per-seat MCP quota is exhausted on the PRIMARY file key (7FOYLdtzCTITjcPeGKwF31) but the TEAM COPY (UYlkCL7jkCVgKWiqAVlEFp, same node ids) still had budget — try the team copy when the primary 429s. Core approximation fixed: composites/primitives used Tailwind-DEFAULT type sizes (text-2xl/xl/lg/base/sm/xs), not the extracted type tokens — replaced with text-heading-lg (28 Bold), text-heading-md (22 Medium), text-body-lg (16), text-caption (12) at correct weights. Every Figma control (input/button/OTP/tag/composer) is an 8px corner, so --radius-md corrected 10px->8px (mirrored in tokens/index.ts) since controls reference rounded-md by name. checkbox/radio => 24px box + gap-4 + Body/L foreground label; Tag => border-2 border-foreground + p-3 + text-caption. Frames: CreateAccount 1526:78839, EmailVerification 1526:79050, Interview 1443:78282, ProfileGen 1473:81622, Composer 434:1194.
